pi_items.source: VitalDB API - vitaldb.load_case(6, 'Primus/CO2') successfully loads data; confirmed by vitaldb.find_cases('Primus/CO2') which lists case 6
VitalDB track naming convention confirmed. Case 6 contains Primus/CO2 waveform track. Verified by loading case data and checking available tracks in case 6
Windows container path specified in task.json and used consistently in setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, and verifier.py

Verified in verifier.py line 89 (CO2_THRESHOLD = 10.0). This threshold is medically reasonable: normal EtCO2 is 35-45 mmHg; threshold of 10 mmHg is used to detect inadequate ventilation/apnea. Case 6 CO2 data has 3085 out of 5145 samples above 10 mmHg, indicating breathing periods
Verified in verifier.py lines 147 and 159, where tolerance is hard-coded as 60 seconds for comparing agent's event timestamps against ground truth intubation/extubation times

privileged_info_summary: VitalDB Case #6 is a real surgical patient dataset from Seoul National University Hospital containing physiological data including the Primus/CO2 capnography waveform. The case has 5,145 CO2 samples with 3,085 samples exceeding the 10.0 mmHg threshold used to identify ventilation periods. The Primus anesthesia machine data is part of the published VitalDB open dataset containing 6,388 patient cases. The task uses a 60-second tolerance window for event timestamp accuracy when verifying intubation and extubation event markers.
